reason: Fixes span main (SessionPool/SessionController) -> IPC DTO contract (ipc.ts) -> renderer (useSessions/App): setActive now awaits the rebuild, send gains an optional sessionId arg, approval routing also fires notify. Trace data flow at each boundary before editing.

MAINT-3 extracts the duplicated runExclusive mutex into one shared agent/serialize.ts; search-before-change before touching shared constants (MAX_LIVE, STREAM_FLUSH_MS) and the error-event funnel pattern reused across prompt/compact/setModel.
